overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a dystopian urban shanty town. The scene features derelict vehicles, a massive collapsed stadium structure, makeshift vendor stalls, and piles of trash set against a backdrop of towering corporate skyscrapers in warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict urban lot with abandoned vehicles and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the shanty town outskirts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shorts walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: weathered concrete bench with trash scattered nearby
derelict blue van with rust and missing windows
massive collapsed stadium or arena with twisted white metal framework
towering corporate skyscraper with 07 signage visible
tall palm trees lining the dirt path
pair of red portable toilet units near the collapsed structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dirt path in a dystopian shanty town, with a concrete bench and abandoned blue van visible. The camera follows a character walking toward a massive collapsed white stadium structure, with towering corporate skyscrapers visible in the distant background. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: path alongside collapsed stadium with food vendor

events.description: approaching the makeshift food vendor stall on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path curving around the collapsed structure toward the vendor area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the wooden stall counter

entered.detail: makeshift wooden vendor stall with corrugated metal roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the massive collapsed stadium structure, which now dominates the left side of the frame in the distance. A makeshift food vendor stall appears on the right, with a vendor standing behind the counter. The concrete bench and abandoned van from the previous segment fall behind as the path curves slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: informal market path with multiple vendor stalls

events.description: passing the brown vendor stall and approaching a yellow market stall

agents.ego_description: walking past the vendor stalls and continuing down the market path

entered.detail: yellow and black painted market stall with illuminated signage
large mound of blue and black garbage bags piled on the ground
tall digital advertisement screens on pillars along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character passes the brown vendor stall and approaches a yellow market stall on the right. Large piles of trash bags become visible in the distance on the right side. Digital billboards line the left side of the path, and the collapsed stadium structure fades into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-strewn path with large garbage piles

events.description: sun becomes prominent in the frame creating strong backlight and lens flare

agents.ego_description: navigating past large trash piles while walking toward the bright sun

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking alongside the trash pile

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster next to the trash pile

segments.scene_description: The character walks past massive piles of blue garbage bags that now dominate the right side of the path. The sun sits low on the horizon creating strong backlighting and warm lens flares. A person with red hair walks alongside the trash piles, and digital billboards continue lining the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dystopian shanty town that shifts from an open dirt path toward a cluttered market alley bathed in golden hour light. It begins by following a character past a concrete bench and an abandoned blue van, moving toward a massive collapsed white stadium structure set against a backdrop of distant corporate skyscrapers. As the character advances, the stadium structure recedes to the left while the path curves past a makeshift food vendor stall on the right. The scene then shifts as the character passes a yellow market stall and digital billboards, with the stadium fading further into the background to reveal large piles of trash bags ahead. Finally, the camera moves past massive mounds of blue garbage bags and a red-haired pedestrian, while the low sun creates strong backlighting and warm lens flares across the urban decay.
